body.title: ThreadProxy / DaemonSupervisor — single owner of daemon thread lifecycle
body.result: DaemonSupervisor singleton in igor/cognition/daemon_supervisor.py: register(name, thread, health_fn), status(), report_str(). Registered in boot_check, main (ne-worker, consolidation-worker, distillation-worker, ne-deep-consolidation), network/listener, discord_bot, web/server. get_daemon_report tool added to metrics.py. 12 tests pass.
body.description: No central registry of what daemon threads are running, whether they're healthy, or whether they shut down cleanly. We just fixed an exit threadlock in ollama_reasoner. Need: register-on-create, health ping, clean-shutdown guarantee, /audit integration.
